records.question: Which track opened in 1964, has exactly 76812 seats, and is named Phoenix International Raceway?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT track.track_id FROM track
WHERE track.year_opened = 1964.0 AND track.seating = 76812.0 AND track.name = 'Phoenix International Raceway'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Track_ID 
FROM track 
WHERE Year_Opened = 1964 
  AND Seating = 76812 
  AND Name = 'Phoenix International Raceway'
